'''âw-m-n-z''' ('''kawamnezoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wamble|wamble]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-m-n-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wamble|wamble]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-m-n-z
|-
! Lemma
| kawamnezoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwamnezoko|thiwamnezoko]] || [[word:jiwamnezoko|jiwamnezoko]] || [[word:shiwamnezoko|shiwamnezoko]] || [[word:kiwamnezoko|kiwamnezoko]]
|-

|-

|-
